steps.title: Identify what best shows dedication and care for a lawn
steps.content: The question asks which quotation best illustrates the father's dedication and care. The strongest signal is explicit description of his maintenance pattern—not just a moment of reaction, but how he typically works. Choice B is the only one that provides this: a vivid metaphor for careful work (“shaving...a priest's chin”), evidence of sustained effort (“All during the season...after supper”), and proof of success (“strong and healthy grass”).

steps.title: Explain why this best illustrates the claim
steps.content: Choice B captures the father's dedication through both his meticulous approach and his consistency over time. The other three choices focus on discrete moments—discovering the broken flower (A), a pause in work (C), or Jim's emotional response (D)—rather than depicting his typical pattern of dedicated care. That matches choice B — B is correct.
